BACKEND ENGINEER: Blueprint v1.1.0 ships major architectural changes — please review section 19. Key takeaways for future work: (1) Schema migrations should batch across workstreams (we shipped 6 fields + 2 tables + 1 index in one prisma db push). (2) Shared files should be touched in single passes (feedback route got I1+I2+I3 in one commit). (3) Always pass available data to AI prompts — we had observationGuide in DB for months but never fed it to feedback generator. AUDIT YOUR PROMPTS for missing context. (4) XP awarding belongs inline in action routes, not via a side-channel /api/gamification/activity (it was a dead endpoint). (5) UI components displaying mutable state need refetch triggers — useEffect([]) is a footgun. Use route changes + custom window events. (6) Backward compat: 'absent = inclusive' — null preferences = show all, untagged clips = pass all filters, null snapshotScores = hide BestMomentCard. New core modules to know: src/engine/learning-assistant/matchers/preference-matcher.ts (OR within categories, AND across, sparse-content fallback), src/services/holistic-scorer.ts scoreSnapshot() + findPeakWindow() for per-frame scoring, src/lib/preference-constants.ts (single source of truth).
